cover: Whiteboard-style infographic on 'From Salesforce Dev to AI Architect: The 2026 Roadmap'. Off-white paper background. Hand-drawn black marker header: 'Salesforce Dev → AI Architect in 2026'. Pastel sticky notes labeled 'Apex + LWC', 'Agentforce 2.0', 'Data Cloud Vector Search', 'LLM Evaluation', 'Security + Trust'. Sections with hand-drawn boxes: Section 1 'Foundation' with points 'Salesforce API v64.0', 'Integration patterns', 'Governor limits'. Section 2 'AI Layer' with points 'gpt-5.5', 'claude-sonnet-4-7', 'gemini-3.1-pro'. Section 3 'Architecture' with points 'RAG', 'multi-agent orchestration', 'observability'. Section 4 'Portfolio' with points 'agent project', 'eval harness', 'enterprise story'. Hand-drawn roadmap arrow from Developer to Architect. Footer quote in blue marker: 'Don’t chase tools. Build systems that survive production.' Flat design, authentic whiteboard marker texture, perfectly legible hand-written typography.
images: Whiteboard-style infographic on 'The 2026 Salesforce-to-AI Skill Stack'. Off-white paper background. Hand-drawn black marker header: 'Salesforce Dev → AI Architect Skill Stack'. Pastel sticky notes in corners labeled 'Ship safely', 'Measure everything', 'Secure by default'. Sections with hand-drawn boxes: Section 1 'Salesforce Core' with points 'Apex bulk patterns', 'LWC native state', 'Salesforce API v64.0'. Section 2 'AI Systems' with points 'RAG', 'tool calling', 'LLM evaluation'. Section 3 'Enterprise Architecture' with points 'identity', 'observability', 'governance'. Section 4 'Portfolio Proof' with points 'Agentforce 2.0 build', 'Data Cloud vector search', 'cost/quality dashboard'. Hand-drawn arrows showing progression from feature builder to decision-system designer. Footer quote in blue marker: 'Architects are paid for judgment, not syntax.' Flat design, authentic whiteboard marker texture, perfectly legible hand-written typography.

Whiteboard-style infographic on 'Three Portfolio Projects for a Salesforce AI Architect'. Off-white paper background. Hand-drawn black marker header: 'Portfolio That Proves You Can Ship'. Pastel sticky notes labeled 'Agentforce 2.0', 'Data Cloud', 'LWC Workbench', 'Eval Harness'. Sections with hand-drawn boxes: Section 1 'Case Triage Agent' with points 'priority classification', 'entitlement lookup', 'human handoff'. Section 2 'Data Cloud RAG' with points 'vector search', 'permissions trimming', 'citations'. Section 3 'AI Evaluation Workbench' with points 'latency', 'cost', 'quality score'. Section 4 'Architecture Evidence' with points 'sequence diagram', 'risk register', 'release plan'. Hand-drawn arrows from project screenshots to interview talking points. Footer quote in blue marker: 'Your portfolio should show decisions, not just demos.' Flat design, authentic whiteboard marker texture, perfectly legible hand-written typography.
